text:
As soon as you have these credentials, all the procedures related to your mobility must be done from theCAMPUS VIRTUAL, the intranet of the University of Jaén. You can access it from the main page of the UJA website or directly at this address <https://virtual.ujaen.es/srv/es/index>.

Remember! YOU WILL RECEIVE ALL THE INFORMATION IN THAT EMAIL.

Accede toCAMPUS VIRTUAL (https://uvirtual.ujaen.es/srv/es/index)

SEE PROCEDURES TO BE CARRIED OUT
